title: oxytropis latibracteata var. latibracteata
intro: Oxytropis latibracteata var. latibracteata is a variety of the Oxytropis latibracteata plant, also known as a type of flowering legume in the pea family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its high content of glycosides and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
